name: XinJiang GuoTong Pipeline CO.,Ltd
summary: XinJiang GuoTong Pipeline CO.,Ltd designs and manufactures prestressed concrete cylinder pipes in China. It also provides other hi-tech concrete products and plastic pipes. The company's products are used in various fields, including water resource projects, municipal works, electric power projects, agricultural irrigation projects, etc. XinJiang GuoTong Pipeline CO.,Ltd was founded in 2001 and is based in √É¬úr√É¬ºmqi, China.
